options.name: --input
options.description: Required. Json file to generate the enum from.

options.name: --output
options.description: Required. Target path for the generated enum.

options.name: --type
options.description:
(Default: CSharp) Type of output file to generate. Valid values: CSharp, Cil,
ClassLibrary, FSharp, VisualBasic

options.name: --collection
options.description: (Default: [*]) JPath to the collection to base the enum on.

options.name: --entryname
options.description: (Default: name) JPath to the name field of a entry in the input file.

options.name: --entryvalue
options.description: JPath to a value field of a entry in the input file.

options.name: --entrycomment
options.description: JPath to a comment field of a entry in the input file.

options.name: --comment
options.description: Comment to add to the generated enum.

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Namespace to add the created enum to.

options.name: --headermode
options.description:
(Default: Default) Mode to use when adding a header. Valid values: Default,
None

options.name: --indentmode
options.description:
(Default: Spaces) Indentation to use when writing output text. Valid values:
Spaces, Tabs

options.name: --indentsize
options.description: (Default: 4) When indenting with spaces this controls how many.

options.name: --newlinemode
options.description:
(Default: Unix) Which newline mode to use when writing output text. Valid
values: Unix, Windows

options.name: --storagetype
options.description:
(Default: Implicit) Underlying storage type for the exported enum. Valid
values: Implicit, Unsigned8Bit, Signed8Bit, Signed16Bit, Unsigned16Bit,
Signed32Bit, Unsigned32Bit, Signed64Bit, Unsigned64Bit

options.name: --curlybracket
options.description:
(Default: NewLine) Which curlybracket-mode to use. Valid values: NewLine,
SameLine
